name: ember-toolkit
description: Sara LaFleur's source-of-truth marketplace for her Claude Code skills and agents, grouped into installable plugins. This is the VS Code / GitHub Copilot Agent Plugins (Preview) mirror of the same plugin set published for Claude Code.

plugins.name: delivery-team
plugins.description: Five virtual delivery teams (intake, qa, build, release, status) that run a request through plan -> test -> build -> release, plus a read-only status reconciler.

plugins.name: librarian
plugins.description: The team librarian — curates durable knowledge into a shared, growing library so repeat work approaches one-shot. Organizes knowledge by domain/subdomain/topic with retrieval descriptions, keeps a single Table of Contents, audits its own descriptions and itself for thrashing, and gates every write behind human approval.

plugins.name: time-ledger
plugins.description: Cross-project time, token, and cost ledger built from Claude Code session transcripts. Scans local session transcripts to produce daily/weekly/monthly hour, token, and cost rollups per project and branch, a calendar-week dashboard, and per-initiative SDLC journey artifacts. Output directory and subscription billing details are configurable via environment variables.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Two repo-level workflow skills: wrap-up (close out a unit of work — audit, human gate, commit, push, merge, clean up) and create-skill-devops (scaffold a project-scoped /devops toolbox for build-environment setup).

plugins.name: story-map
plugins.description: Scaffolds a complete, populated UAT story map for an application — discovers roles, workflows, and routes from the codebase, then generates a full role-first test folder tree (happy paths, edge cases, run sheet, scope matrix) plus ready-to-run Playwright MCP UAT execution and status-reset agent prompts.
